WT.MassiveTooltip: Requires Body 4d or higher to wield
WT.MoraleDesc: Group morale — at zero they rout
WT.SpellDamagePlaceholderHint: Damage inflicted on a successful cast
WT.QRPoolTooLow: Pool too low to roll — add more dice.
WT.ManeuverTier2Notice: GM resolves outcome based on Width tiers below.
WT.ManeuverDisplayMoveResult: Opponents are impressed or intimidated — GM determines social effect.
WT.ManeuverDisplayMoveRules: First round only. No damage. Show off your skill to intimidate.
WT.ManeuverDrawRules: Draw or ready a weapon as a free action with your attack.
WT.ManeuverFeintResult: Opponent loses 1d from next defense roll against you.
WT.ManeuverFeintRules: No damage. Fakes out the target for a follow-up attack.
WT.ManeuverWaitRules: Delay your action to act after a specific trigger.
WT.ManeuverStandResult: You stand up from prone. No other action this round.
WT.ManeuverStandRules: Removes the Prone condition. Costs your action.
WT.ManeuverShoveResult: Push target back. +1d on follow-up Trip/Slam against them.
WT.ManeuverShoveRules: No damage. Push opponent back; sets up Trip or Slam.
WT.ManeuverTackleResult: Target knocked prone. Both combatants go down.
WT.ManeuverTackleRules: −1d penalty. Both attacker and target end up prone.
WT.ManeuverTripResult4: Target falls prone and drops held items.
WT.ManeuverTripRules: Width 2: stumble. Width 3: prone. Width 4+: prone + disarmed.
WT.ManeuverSlamResult3: Solid hit — target knocked back and prone.
WT.ManeuverSlamResult4: Devastating slam — target prone, stunned 1 round.
WT.ManeuverSlamRules: Height 3+ required. Slam opponent into ground or wall.
WT.ManeuverDisarmResult2: Target's grip loosened — −1d with weapon next round.
WT.ManeuverDisarmResult3: Weapon knocked from hand — lands nearby.
WT.ManeuverDisarmResult4: Weapon sent flying — lands far away.
WT.ManeuverDisarmRules: Width determines how far the weapon goes.
WT.ManeuverChargeRules: First round only. Must move full speed toward target.
WT.ManeuverKnockoutRules: All damage converts to Shock. Width determines severity.
WT.ManeuverThreatenRules: No damage. Charm/Command + Intimidate vs target's Stability.
WT.ManeuverPinResult: Target pinned. Must escape (Body+Fight) on their action.
WT.ManeuverPinRules: Grab and hold. Neither combatant can take other actions.
WT.ManeuverRestrainResult: Target restrained — cannot act. You maintain the hold.
WT.ManeuverStrangleRules: Must have target pinned first. Damage to head each round held.
WT.ManeuverSubmissionHoldResult3: Painful hold — more Shock to limb.
WT.ManeuverSubmissionHoldRules: Must have target pinned. Targets a limb. Wrenching free costs Killing to self.
WT.ManeuverRedirectResult2: Partial redirect — reduced damage to new target.
WT.ManeuverRedirectResult3: Clean redirect — full damage to new target.
WT.ManeuverRedirectResult4: Expert redirect — full damage plus bonus.
WT.ManeuverRedirectRules: Requires a parry. Redirect incoming attack to another target.
WT.ManeuverIronKissResult2: Glancing blow with weapon butt — Shock.
WT.ManeuverIronKissResult4: Crushing strike — Shock converts to Killing.
WT.ManeuverIronKissRules: Strike with weapon hilt/butt. Close range only.
WT.ManeuverDisfiguringStrikeRules: Called shot to face (Height 10). Causes lasting scars.
WT.ManeuverDisplayKillResult3: Spectacular kill — morale damage to enemies.
WT.ManeuverDisplayKillRules: Must kill the target. Width determines morale effect on witnesses.
WT.ManeuverFormationChargeResult: Group charge — bonus damage based on formation size.
WT.ManeuverFormationChargeRules: Coordinated charge with allies. First round only.
